payload.title: Add compact inbox-submit output for architect loops
payload.summary: narada inbox submit currently echoes the full submitted payload plus delivery metadata. In interactive architect/operator loops this repeats information the caller just supplied and burns context. The full echo should remain available for debugging, but compact output should be the default or a first-class mode.

observations.finding: inbox submit repeats the full submitted payload in command output
observations.detail: A proposal submission returned the full envelope payload, including the observations and requests that were just sent, plus delivery metadata. This produced dozens of transcript lines for a successful routine submission.
observations.impact: The operator/architect chat pays twice for the same text: once in the command construction and again in the echoed result.

observations.finding: Interactive and debugging output needs are conflated
observations.detail: For routine architect use, the needed result is status, envelope_id, portable artifact path, routing/preflight warnings, and commit/push guidance. Full payload echo is useful for debug or machine validation, but not for the default human loop.
observations.impact: Agents must manually ignore large output or build ad hoc filters, both of which increase friction and error risk.

requests.text: Add compact output for narada inbox submit, e.g. --format compact-json or --view architect-loop, returning status, envelope_id, portable artifact, routing/preflight warnings, and next_steps only.
Move full payload echo behind explicit --verbose, --format full-json, or equivalent debugging mode.
Ensure compact submit output is safe to paste into chat transcripts without repeating the submitted payload.

payload.authority_note: Operator explicitly identified inbox submit return echo as token waste and asked to submit.
